title: carex × prahliana
intro: Carex × prahliana, also known as the sweet grass sedge, is a hybrid sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing stress, and promoting relaxation. Carex × prahliana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
